title: Namorix Addon Manifest
description: Manifest describing a Namorix addon (used to render the Package Center and to tell the Server how to deploy the container).

$schema.description: URL of this schema, used by editors for autocomplete/validation.

id.description: Unique addon identifier, lowercase with hyphens. Example: weave

name.description: Display name shown in the Package Center and sidebar. Example: Weave

description.description: Short description shown under the addon name in its card.

version.description: Semantic version of the addon. Example: 0.3.1

category.description: Category used for sidebar filtering in the Package Center.

icon.description: Relative path to the icon file in the repo (e.g. assets/icon.svg), or an absolute URL.

author.description: Person or organization maintaining the addon.

repo.description: URL of the repository containing the addon's source code.

image.description: Docker image name, without tag. Example: ghcr.io/namorix/weave

imageTag.description: Image tag for this release. Defaults to the value of version if not set.

arch.description: CPU architectures supported by this addon.

volumes.description: Paths that need to be mounted for persistent data inside the container.

options.description: Default config values, keys must match the keys in schema.

schema.description: Validation rule for each key in options, using a Hassio-style type syntax: str, str?, int(min,max), bool, port, password, list(a|b|c), url, email...

boot.description: Whether the addon should auto-start with Namorix.

minNamorixVersion.description: Minimum Namorix core version this addon is compatible with.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp this manifest was last updated (ISO 8601).
